description: Telemetry emitted without a shared trace/request id, making it impossible to pivot from a metric anomaly to the explaining logs and trace.
body: Failure mode: logs, metrics, and traces are emitted independently with no common correlation id, so during an incident a metric spike cannot be tied to specific traces or log lines and root cause takes far longer. Detection signals: logs lack a trace/request id; traces and logs cannot be joined; investigators grep by timestamp guesswork. Do not emit telemetry without a propagated correlation id. Safer fallback: generate and propagate a request/trace id through all signals, include it in structured logs and span attributes, and verify a metric anomaly can be pivoted to its trace and logs.
